gates.name: MetLife Gate
gates.notes: Main entrance. West Hall food court immediately inside. Halal food (Shah's) available in West Hall.

gates.name: Verizon Gate
accessibleFeatures: disability drop-off zone in Lot C
gates.notes: Adjacent to accessible parking Lot C drop-off zone. Elevator access to all levels. Recommended for wheelchair users arriving by vehicle.

gates.name: HCLTech Gate
gates.notes: Southeast entrance. Elevator access to all levels.

levels.name: Lower Bowl (100 Level)
levels.description: Closest to the pitch. Sections 101-149 wrap around the field. Accessible seating available in all sections.

levels.name: Mezzanine Club (200 Level)
levels.description: Mid-level premium seating. Club lounges and premium concessions. Elevator access from east and west premium entrances.

levels.name: Upper Deck (300 Level)
levels.description: Highest level. Budget-friendly seating with full pitch views. Elevator access available.

accessibleRoutes.description: Take elevator at Verizon Gate lobby to reach Mezzanine (200) or Upper Deck (300) levels. Staff available to assist.
Elevator located at HCLTech Gate southeast lobby. Access to all upper levels.
Elevator at Moody's Gate northwest entrance. Access to all upper levels.
Dedicated elevator for premium seating access on the east side.
Dedicated elevator for premium seating access on the west side.
Request gate-to-seat wheelchair transportation from any Accessibility Assistant at the stadium gates. Available at no charge.

transit.name: NJ TRANSIT Rail
transit.description: Primary transit option. Trains from New York Penn Station connect through Secaucus Junction to the stadium. Match ticket holders only.
transit.route: New York Penn Station → Secaucus Junction → Stadium
transit.ticketing: Must purchase in advance via NJ TRANSIT Mobile App. Tickets NOT sold at stations or on board.
transit.frequency: Matchday service starts 4 hours before kickoff, continues 2 hours after final whistle.
transit.sustainabilityNote: Lowest carbon footprint option. Carries up to 1,000 passengers per train.
tips: Download NJ TRANSIT app before match day
Your match ticket includes a Boarding Zone — follow it
Allow 60-90 minutes from NYC Penn Station
Service is exclusive to match ticket holders

transit.name: PATH Train (connecting)
transit.description: Connects Hoboken, Jersey City, and Newark to Manhattan. Transfer to NJ TRANSIT at Newark Penn Station or NYC Penn Station to reach stadium.
transit.route: Hoboken/Jersey City/Newark → NYC Penn Station or Newark Penn → NJ TRANSIT → Stadium
tips: Not a direct route to stadium — requires NJ TRANSIT transfer
Useful if staying in Hoboken or Jersey City
Transfer at NYC Penn Station is most straightforward

transit.name: Official FIFA Stadium Shuttles
transit.description: Shuttle buses from designated hubs in New York City and New Jersey park-and-ride locations.
transit.ticketing: Must be booked in advance through official channels.
transit.sustainabilityNote: Shared transport — reduces individual car emissions.
tips: Book shuttle tickets early — capacity is limited
Follow official FIFA or host city website for pickup locations
Allow extra time for security screening at shuttle hubs

transit.name: Rideshare / Taxi
transit.description: Rideshare drop-off and pick-up zones are designated around the stadium complex.
tips: Expect significant surge pricing before and after matches
Drop-off zones may be 10-15 minute walk from gates
Consider taking rideshare to Secaucus Junction and transferring to NJ TRANSIT

food.name: Vegetarian Options
locations: Portable stands and main concessions across 100, 200, and 300 concourses

food.name: General Concessions
locations: All concourse levels — concession stands located near every 4-5 sections
food.notes: Mobile ordering available at 30+ locations for express pickup.

general.description: Public restrooms located throughout all concourses on every level.

family.description: Single-user / family / gender-neutral restrooms available on every level.
family.note: Ask Guest Services representative for nearest location.

bagPolicy.summary: FIFA World Cup universal clear bag policy. One bag per person.
permitted: Clear plastic/vinyl/PVC bag, max 12in x 6in x 12in (30cm x 15cm x 30cm), fully transparent, no tinting
Small clutch/wallet/pouch (does NOT need to be clear), max 4.5in x 6.5in
One-gallon clear resealable plastic freezer bag (e.g., Ziploc)
prohibited: Backpacks of any size (even clear ones exceeding dimensions)
Fanny packs, camera cases, binocular cases
Any opaque bag larger than clutch limit
bagPolicy.important: No bag storage available at the stadium. Non-compliant bags will be turned away.

waterPolicy.permitted: One soft, plastic, factory-sealed disposable water bottle, max 20 oz (590 ml)

prohibitedItems: Outside food and beverages (except permitted water)
policies.gateOpenTime: Gates open approximately 3 hours before kickoff for FIFA World Cup matches.
policies.reEntryPolicy: No re-entry. Once you exit the stadium, you cannot re-enter.

parking.requirements: Valid state-issued accessible parking plate or hang tag must be visible. Valid pre-paid parking permit required.
parking.dropOff: Lot C, adjacent to Verizon Gate (Gate B)

accessibility.seating: Wheelchair, low-mobility, and companion seating available on ALL levels and across all price ranges.
services: Gate-to-seat wheelchair transportation (request at any gate)
Assistive Listening System via ListenWIFI app
Closed captioning on ribbon boards and concourse TVs
Accessibility Assistants stationed at all gates

weather.note: MetLife Stadium is an OPEN-AIR venue with no retractable roof.

heatSafety: Arrive hydrated — bring your permitted 20oz water bottle
Free water refill stations located on all concourse levels
Seek shade in concourse areas during halftime
Wear sunscreen, hat, and light clothing
First Aid stations can assist with heat-related symptoms
rainGuidance: Umbrellas are PROHIBITED — bring a rain poncho instead

tips: Use NJ TRANSIT rail — lowest carbon footprint transit option
This digital assistant replaces paper maps, guides, and signage queries
Use mobile ordering to reduce concession queue waste and energy
Recycling bins are located next to all trash receptacles throughout the stadium
Bring a reusable clear bag — reduce single-use plastic
venueFeatures: LED lighting throughout stadium (90% energy reduction vs. traditional)
Solar panel installations on surrounding infrastructure
